title: ophrys × pseudobertolonii subsp. catalaunica
intro: Ophrys × pseudobertolonii subsp. catalaunica is a hybrid orchid species, a cross between Ophrys pseudobertolonii and Ophrys catalaunica. It is known for its unique appearance and medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections due to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Ophrys × pseudobertolonii subsp. catalaunica include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, and to act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Ophrys × pseudobertolonii subsp. catalaunica are often used in traditional medicine, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
